overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a rainy night walk through Night City. The player character walks under elevated highways, crosses a busy intersection with futuristic vehicles, and approaches a large illuminated monument in a corporate plaza surrounded by neon advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk under the highway overpass, observing the rain-soaked street

notable_agents.action: person sitting on bench against the building wall

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass with support pillars spanning the street
tall modern building with reflective glass facade and illuminated windows
large glowing advertisement with purple and pink neon colors
tall pole with bright white floodlights illuminating the rain

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath a massive elevated highway structure in a futuristic city at night. The sidewalk runs alongside a glass office building while heavy rain falls, creating wet reflections on the concrete. Streetlights cast bright beams through the rain, and a lone pedestrian sits on a bench against the building.

events.description: exits covered walkway into open intersection with heavy rain exposure
red sports car drives past from left to right while crossing the street

agents.ego_description: crossing the multi-lane street, navigating between vehicles in the rain

notable_agents.action: red sports car speeding through the intersection with headlights on

entered.detail: broad yellow striped pedestrian crossing markings on wet asphalt
low yellow and black striped posts separating sidewalk from road
futuristic red sports car with glowing accents and bright headlights

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the overpass into an open intersection with heavy rain falling directly. The camera crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk as a futuristic red sports car speeds past. The environment opens up to reveal tall skyscrapers with neon signage while streetlights reflect off the wet asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian plaza with corporate advertising and central monument

events.description: entering plaza area with illuminated worry-free advertisement pillar
approaching large illuminated monument structure at plaza center

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza toward the monument, passing corporate advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket with red markings walking ahead toward the monument

entered.detail: tall illuminated rectangular sign displaying 'Worry-Free' text and corporate logo
massive golden-lit sculptural monument with intricate mechanical design
glowing blue and cyan neon signs on building facades

segments.scene_description: Walking through a pedestrian plaza with paved tiles and embedded lighting strips. A prominent illuminated 'Worry-Free' advertisement pillar stands to the right while the camera approaches a massive golden monument in the distance. Another pedestrian walks ahead in the same direction, and neon signs glow against the dark rainy backdrop.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the sheltered shadows of an urban overpass into the expansive, neon-lit heart of a corporate plaza. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway, moving along a glass office building where heavy rain creates shimmering reflections on the concrete around a lone pedestrian. As the camera emerges from under the structure, the environment opens into a wide intersection where a red sports car speeds past across a yellow-striped crosswalk under the glow of towering skyscrapers. The scene then shifts from the open road into a pedestrian plaza characterized by paved tiles and embedded lighting strips, passing a glowing Worry-Free advertisement pillar. Finally, the camera follows another pedestrian toward a massive golden monument that looms in the distance against the dark, rainy backdrop of the city.
